tools.name: view_portfolio
tools.description: Opens the interactive portfolio, optionally at a specific section. The user can also navigate between sections using tabs inside the portfolio. To jump to a specific section (e.g. the user asks for contact info or work samples), call this again with the section argument — the newest card supersedes

tools.name: booking_get_slots
tools.description: Get available booking time slots for a date range

tools.name: booking_create
tools.description: Create a booking at a specific time slot
